sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110887" key="filaskhth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλ-ασκητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n110887.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lover of training</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exercise,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:46:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
